conbody.p: Overview: A CDS Team Performance dashboard helps a CDI Manager to analyze the overall performance of the individual CDSs and compare team performance.
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDE One Staff Management Team Performance .

Team Performance displays the following:
KPI cards: Review Rate, Clarification Rate, Financial Clarification Rate, Avg. Initial Review TAT (Hrs)
Reviews chart
Clarification Rate chart
Provider Response and Agreed Rate chart
Case Mix Index chart
SOI/ROM Impact chart
CDS/Coder Match chart
On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets filtered in the tabular chart.

Default Display: By default, the dashboard displays the data for the inpatient encounters discharged in the last three calendar months. Click the ‘Reset’ button to reset the discharge date and select the required date. When you reset the discharge date, the encounters that do not have a discharge date assigned are not displayed.

entry.p: Review Rate for the selected time period.
Out of total encounters, the percentage of encounters reviewed.
Review Rate= Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) / Total encounters (Admissions/Discharges) x 100.
Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Format: 89%

row.entry: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

The Clarification Rate for the selected time period.
Out of total encounters reviewed, the percentage of sent clarifications with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.

Clarification Rate = (Count of clarifications with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED sent for the reviewed encounters/Count of Initial Reviews performed)*100 Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Format: 25%
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

Financial Impact Clarification Rate for the selected time period.
Out of total encounters reviewed, the percentage of Encounters with Financial Impact Clarifications.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Encounters with Financial Impact Clarifications /Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) )* 100)Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED / Count of encounters with an initial review date) X 100
Format: 37%

entry.p: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

row.entry:
Avg. Initial Review TAT (Hours) for the selected time period.
The number of hours between encounter Admit Date/time and the date/time the Working Review was first created.

(Initial Review TAT (hours) for an encounter = Initial Review Date/Time- Admit Date/Time) hoursAvg. Initial Review TAT(Hours) = Sum of Initial Review TAT(Hours) of all the reviewed encounters / Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews)
Format: 150
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

conbody.p:
The 'Reviews' chart displays the Assigned and Encounters Reviewed metrics for each CDS.
X-axis: Displays the CDS name in ascending order. (Format: CDS ID)
Y-axis: Displays the rate.
Sort Order: Data is sorted by CDS ID in ascending order.
Info icon(text on hover): Encounter Status: Includes all encounter statuses except 'Review Not Needed'.
Reviews chart Metrics
Metric Description Formula/Calculation Exclusion Criteria(if any) Tooltip
Assigned
This metric displays the count of total encounters for each CDS.
Format: Bar
Assigned= Total count of Discharged Encounters for each CDS Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
The tooltip displays the count of 'Total Encounters' assigned to each CDS.
Format: Assigned: 25
Encounters Reviewed
This metric displays 'Initial Reviews' for each CDS.
The count of encounters with an initial review date/time by every CDS.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
The tooltip displays the count of 'Initial Reviews'.
Format: Encounters Reviewed: 21
% Reviewed This metric displays 'Review Rate' for each CDS.
% Reviewed = (Encounters Reviewed/Total Encounters) *100
** Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

The ‘Clarification Rate’ chart displays the Encounter Clarification Rate and Impact Clarification Rate metrics for each CDS.
X-axis: Displays the CDS name in ascending order. (Format: CDS ID)
Y-axis: Displays the rate.
Tooltip: Displays the following details- Encounters Reviewed, Encounters with Clarification, Encounters with Financial Impact Clarification
Info icon(text on hover): Encounter Status: Includes all encounter statuses except 'Review Not Needed'; Clarification Status: Includes all clarification statuses except 'Removed' or 'Retracted'; 'Type at Reconciliation' value is considered.
Clarification Rate Metrics
Metric Description Formula/Calculation Exclusion Criteria(if any) Tooltip
Encounter Clarification Rate This metric displays the percentage of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED for each CDS.
Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED./ Count of Initial Reviews performed) *100
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
1. Encounters Reviewed: Displays the count of initial reviews.
2. Encounters with Clarifications: Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.
3. Encounters with Financial Impact Clarifications: Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.
Financial Impact Clarification Rate
This metric displays the percentage of reviewed encounters at least one financial impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED for each CDS.
Note: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED / Count of encounters with an initial review date) X 100
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

p.b: Team Performance - Provider Response and Agreed Rate chart

conbody.p:
The ‘Provider Response and Agreed Rate' chart displays the 'Provider Response Rate' and 'Provider Agreed Rate' metrics for each CDS.
X-axis: Displays the CDS name in ascending order. (Format: CDS ID)
Y-axis: Displays the rate.
Tooltip: Display the following details- Clarifications Sent, Clarifications Responded, Clarifications Agreed in addition to the Provider Response and Agreed Rate.
Info icon(text on hover): Encounter Status: Includes all encounter statuses except 'Review Not Needed'. Clarification Status: Includes all clarification statuses except 'Removed' or 'Retracted'.
Provider Response and Agreed Rate chart Metrics
Metric Description Formula/Calculation Exclusion Criteria(if any) Tooltip
Provider Response Rate This metric displays the percentage of sent clarifications responded by the providers for each CDS.
Provider Response Rate= (The count of overall clarifications responded by the Provider with Final Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response/ The count of overall clarifications sent with status other than DELETED or RETRACTED for the reviewed encounters) *100
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
"Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
Only Clarifications with FINAL response are considered
1. Clarifications Sent: Count of sent clarifications with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.
2. Clarifications Responded:Count of clarifications with a Final response as Agreed, Not Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Specificity Diagnosis, Discuss, Sent to another Provider or Unable to Determine.
3. Clarifications Agreed:
Count of clarifications with a Final response as Agreed.
Provider Agreed Rate This metric displays the percentage of responded clarifications agreed by the providers for each CDS.
Provider Agreed Rate= (The count of overall clarifications agreed by the Provider with Final Response as Agreed/ The count of overall clarifications responded by the Provider with Final Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) *100
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
"Deleted" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
Only Clarifications with FINAL response are considered

p.b: Team Performance - Case Mix Index chart

conbody.p:
The ‘Case Mix Index’ chart displays the 'CMI Shift %' metrics for each CDS.
X-axis: Displays the CDS name in ascending order. (Format: CDS ID)
Y-axis: Displays the rate.
Info icon(text on hover): CMI metrics are for all the reconciled cases. Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.

row.entry: This metric displays the percentage CMI shift for every month.

entry.p: CMI Shift % = (The sum of CMI Shift (CMI After CDI - CMI Before CDI) for the Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria) / (CMI Before CDI for Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-No Impact, Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, SOI/ROM Impact Unassigned Impact) encounters that meet the report criteria). X 100. (Rounded to 2 decimal places. E.g. 2.74%.)

1. CMI Before CDI: Average of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).

2. CMI After CDI: Average of Final DRG WTs of all encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).

3. CMI Shift: Shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).

conbody.p:
The ‘SOI/ROM Impact’ chart displays the '% Cases with SOI Impact' and '% Cases with ROM Impact' for each CDS.
X-axis: Displays the CDS name in ascending order. (Format: CDS ID)
Info icon(text on hover): Percentage of reconciled cases that had an upward shift in the SOI/ROM (SOI/ROM After > SOI/ROM Before) due to CDS' work on the encounters. Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.
Tooltip: Displays the following details - Cases with SOI Impact, Cases with ROM Impact, Reconciled Encounters
SOI/ROM Impact chart Metrics
Metric Description Formula/Calculation Exclusion Criteria(if any) Tooltip
% Cases with SOI Impact
This metric displays the percentage of reconciled cases that had an upward shift in the SOI (SOI After > SOI Before) due to CDS' work on the encounters.
Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
% cases with SOI Impact= The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the SOI After is greater than SOI Before./ Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
Encounters with status Reconciled Impact, Reconciled No Impact, and Auto Reconciled are considered in this metric calculation.
Tooltip1:
Cases with SOI Impact:
The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the SOI After is greater than SOI Before.
Tooltip 2:
Cases with ROM Impact.
The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the ROM After is greater than ROM Before
Tooltip 3:
Reconciled Encounters
Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
% Cases with ROM Impact This metric displays the percentage of reconciled cases that had an upward shift in the ROM(ROM After > ROM Before) due to CDS' work on the encounters. % cases with ROM Impact= The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the ROM After is greater than ROM Before./ Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
Encounters with status Reconciled Impact, Reconciled No Impact, and Auto Reconciled are considered in this metric calculation.

The ‘CDS/Coder Match’ chart displays the 'CDS/Coder Match Rate' for each CDS.
X-axis: Displays the CDS name in ascending order. (Format: CDS ID)
Info icon(text on hover): Percentage of reconciled encounters in which Final DRG matches Possible DRG (Or Working DRG if Possible DRG is Blank). Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.
Tooltip: Display the following details- CDS/Coder Match Rate, Matched Encounters , Reconciled Encounters.
CDS/Coder Match chart Metrics
Metric Description Formula/Calculation Exclusion Criteria(if any) Tooltip
CDS/Coder Match Rate
The CDS/Coder Match Rate for each CDS.
CDS/Coder Match Rate = (Count of Reconciled Encounters with Match =Y / Count of Reconciled Encounters in the selected date range) *100
Tooltip 1:
CDS/Coder Match Rate: The total Count of Reconciled Encounters with Match =Y / Count of Reconciled Encounters in the selected date range *100
Matched Encounters: The total count of reconciled encounters where Final Coded DRG matches with Possible DRG (Working DRG if Possible DRG = Blank)
Reconciled Encounters: The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto
Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

ul.li: Compares Final Coded DRG to the Possible DRG (or Working DRG when Possible DRG is Blank)
Reconciliation Assessment DRG is NOT used to calculate the CDS/Coder Match.
For reconciled encounters without Possible DRG (i.e. Possible DRG is Blank), CDS/Coder Match is "Y" when Final Coded DRG matches with Working DRG.
For reconciled encounters with Possible DRG , CDS/Coder Match is "Y" when Final Coded DRG matches with Possible DRG.

p.note: Applicable to all Reconciled cases (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled) and Grouper Types (MS-DRG and APR Groupers)

row.entry: Final Coded DRG does not match with the Working DRG.
Final Coded DRG matches Working DRG
Final Coded DRG matches Working DRG
Final Coded DRG matches Working DRG

Final Coded DRG matches Working DRG. Note: Final Coded DRG WT and Working DRG WT are different. This will be treated as an exception. The CDS doesn’t add all the codes coder has added, this could result in different WTs for APR groupers.
Final Coded DRG doesn’t match with the Possible DRG.
Final Coded DRG matches Possible DRG.
Final Coded DRG matches Possible DRG.

entry.p: Final Coded DRG matches Possible DRG.
Note: Final Coded DRG WT and Possible DRG WT are different.

ul.li: Displays the discharge date range here. You can select required dates from the date lookup.
With the Reset button, you can reset the discharge date range.
Tooltip: Use "Cltr + Click" to reset the Discharge Date.
Displays a list of active and inactive facilities that you have access to. The list is sorted alphabetically.
You can select multiple facilities
You can search the facility by Facility ID or Description.
Format: Facility Description (Facility ID)
Default: ALL
Displays a list of active and inactive payers associated with the facilities that you have access to. The list is sorted alphabetically.
You can select multiple payers
"Unassigned Payer" displays data for the encounters that do not have a payer assigned.
You can search the Payer by Payer ID or Description.
Format: Payer Description (Payer ID)
Default: ALL
Displays a list of active and inactive CDSs associated with the facilities you have access to.
The CDS Filter in all the reports displays the users with at-least CDS or CDS Manager role assigned.
"Unassigned CDS" displays data for the encounters that do not have a CDS assigned.
Format: Last Name, First Name MI (CDS ID)
Default: ALL

Displays the available patient types.
Example: Inpatient, Outpatient.
Default: Inpatient
Displays the list of available units.
You can select multiple Units.
You can search the Unit.
Default: ALL

entry.p:
Displays the available options for Weekend Only. Stay- Y and N
You can select more than one option.
Weekend Only Stay = Y ( Unassigned encounters admitted after Friday, 6PM and Discharged before Sunday, 11.59 PM)
Default: ALL

ul.li: Displays the list of available Admit Services.
You can select multiple Admit Services.
You can search the Admit Service.
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available Visit Types.
You can select multiple visit types.
You can search the Visit Type.
Default: ALL

entry.p: Total Encounters= Count of inpatient discharges with status other than 'Review Not Needed'.
Encounters Reviewed= Count of encounters reviewed with or without clarifications.
% Reviewed = (Encounters Reviewed/ Total Encounters) x 100. E.g. 89%

row.entry: Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED/ Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews)) x100. E.g. 33%

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact Clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED/Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) ) x 100). E.g. 30%

Provider Response Rate =(Count of clarifications with a Final response as Agreed, Not Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Specificity Diagnosis, Discuss, Sent to another Provider or Unable to Determine/Count of Clarifications Sent) x100. E.g. 90%
Provider Agreed Rate =(Count of clarifications with a Final response as Agreed/Count of Clarifications Responded) x100. E.g. 90%

The avg. of R-DRG WTs (or W-DRG WT if R-DRG is blank) of all Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Both, Financial Impact) encounters and F-DRG WTs of all Reconciled-No Impact, Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact) and Auto Reconciled encounters.
The avg. of Final DRG WTs of all reconciled (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto Reconciled) encounters.

entry.p: CMI Shift = (CMI After - CMI Before);
CMI Shift(%)= (CMI After - CMI Before)/CMI Before X 100. E.g. 3.14%.
% cases with SOI Impact= (Count of Reconciled encounters with SOI After > SOI Before/Count of Reconciled encounters.) X100
% cases with ROM Impact= (Count of Reconciled encounters with ROM After >ROM Before/Count of Reconciled encounters.) X100

row.entry: CDS/Coder Match Rate = (Count of Reconciled Encounters in which Final DRG matches Possible DRG (Or Working DRG if Possible DRG is Blank) / Count of Reconciled Encounters) X100. E.g. 90%
